mouth_pose: upper front teeth pressed down on the lower lip with a narrow gap for breath, teeth-on-lip /f/ labiodental articulation, visible tiny puff of air escaping between teeth and lip
sound_gesture: blowing a soft breeze forward, one paw raised palm-up as if catching wind, tail curling behind
word_decor: round paper fan in one paw
expression: serene half-closed meditating eyes, calm mood

voice.character_description: gentle airy voice, older wiser than the others, calm cadence

clips.gentle_retry: Light breath. Feel your top teeth.
clips.friday_acknowledge: You carry my breath now. I am with you.
